name: The Trade Show
effect: Convene an industry at significant expense to narrate the future in a convention center. This card is considered thought-leading.

clauses.name: BOOTH PRESENCE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a vendor occupies more than 400 square feet of floor space: Their platform is considered enterprise-grade.

clauses.name: KEYNOTE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: When a keynote is delivered: All product limitations are suspended for the duration of the slide deck.

clauses.name: BADGE SCAN EFFECT
clauses.rule: If contact information is collected: A pipeline is considered generated.

witness_quote: Great energy on the floor this year.
